title: mypy: 10 import-untyped errors (missing stubs)
description:
10 import-untyped errors from missing type stubs:
- aiocoap (6 occurrences in coap/transport.py, coap/resources.py, coap/udp_server.py, dashboard/app.py, crypto/oscore.py)
- serial/pyserial (2 in interface/serial.py, interface/kiss/serial.py)

Fix: pip install types-pyserial (for serial), and add # type: ignore[import-untyped] with explanation for aiocoap (no official stubs).
